mod.loaded: Smart Pipes {{version}} loaded. This is an alpha build; use 'sp_help' in the SMAPI console.
port.exists: This object already has a Smart Port.
port.invalid-target: Smart Ports can currently be installed on chests and processing machines.
port.selected: Port selected - {{mode}}; priority {{priority}}; allow {{allow}}; deny {{deny}}; keep {{keep}}; quality {{quality}}.
port.none: There is no Smart Port on that object.
network.activity: Activity: {{last}} transfer(s) last cycle, {{total}} total; {{stalled}} idle/blocked cycle(s); topology cache {{hits}} hit(s), {{misses}} rebuild(s).
network.none: No Smart Pipe network found at the cursor.
command.no-selected-port: No Smart Port is selected. Return to the game and left-click a port with the Pipe Wrench, then run the command again.
shipping-valve.mode: Safe Shipping Valve: {{mode}}. Only matching items can be sold.
shipping-valve.installed: Safe Shipping Valve installed on the shipping bin. It is disabled until explicitly enabled.
shipping-valve.installed-mini: Safe Shipping Valve installed on the Mini-Shipping Bin. It is disabled until explicitly enabled.
shipping-valve.exists: This shipping bin already has a Safe Shipping Valve.
shipping-valve.none: This shipping bin doesn't have a Safe Shipping Valve.
shipping-valve.removed: Removed the Safe Shipping Valve. Its rules were reset for safety.
attachment.returned: Returned {{count}} Smart Pipes attachment(s) from the removed object.
ui.inventory-to-allow: Backpack - click an item to add it to the allow list
ui.inventory-to-deny: Backpack - click an item to add it to the deny list
ui.pick-from-backpack: Click a hotbar item, or type an item name / ID
ui.pick-item-title: Choose an item - this only fills the filter field
gmcm.enable-automation.name: Enable automation
gmcm.enable-automation.tooltip: Enable automatic item movement through Smart Pipes.
gmcm.transfer-interval.name: Transfer interval (ticks)
gmcm.transfer-interval.tooltip: How often each pipe network is processed. 60 ticks is roughly one real-time second.
gmcm.items-per-transfer.name: Items per transfer
gmcm.items-per-transfer.tooltip: Maximum stack size moved by a single transfer operation.
gmcm.show-transfer-messages.name: Show transfer messages
gmcm.show-transfer-messages.tooltip: Show an on-screen message whenever Smart Pipes moves an item.
gmcm.transfers-per-cycle.name: Transfers per network cycle
gmcm.transfers-per-cycle.tooltip: Maximum number of transfer operations one network can complete each cycle.
gmcm.processing-budget.name: Processing time budget (ms)
gmcm.processing-budget.tooltip: Maximum real-time processing budget per update. Lower values reduce frame-time impact; higher values help very large networks keep up.
gmcm.hide-pipes.name: Hide pipes when not building
gmcm.hide-pipes.tooltip: Hide pipe segments unless you are holding a Smart Pipes component.
gmcm.show-installation-messages.name: Show installation messages
gmcm.show-installation-messages.tooltip: Show a lower-left HUD message after installing a Smart Port or Safe Shipping Valve. Disabled by default to keep the building view clear.
gmcm.show-attachments.name: Show attachments without wrench
gmcm.show-attachments.tooltip: When enabled, installed Smart Ports and Safe Shipping Valves remain visible without the Pipe Wrench; direction arrows still require the wrench. This only affects appearance.
story.mail.robin: Hello @,^I've noticed that your farm has enough processing equipment to make hauling materials a job of its own. I drew up a basic logistics system that should help.^If you're interested, the blueprint is available from my shop for 2,000g. I'll include the proper pipe wrench with your first copy.^  -Robin[#]A Better Way to Move Things
story.mail.lewis: Hello @,^Robin tells me your new pipe network is working. If it will be connected to the town shipping service, I want the final step to be deliberate and safe.^I've authorized the Safe Shipping Valve design for your use. Its recipe is now available. A new valve starts disabled, so configure its rules before turning it on.^  -Lewis[#]Safe Automatic Shipping
story.blueprint-purchased: You study Robin's blueprint. You learned how to craft Smart Item Pipes, Smart Ports, and a Pipe Wrench. Robin included a wrench with the plans.
story.quest.title: A Simple Supply Line
story.quest.description: Robin wants you to prove the design with a small working network before expanding it across the farm.
story.quest.objective: Connect a chest and a processing machine to the same pipe network using Smart Ports.
story.tutorial-completed: Supply line complete! Reward: 10 Smart Item Pipes and 4 Smart Ports.
story.valve-unlocked: You learned how to craft a Safe Shipping Valve.
